title: armeria scabra subsp. sibirica
intro: Armeria scabra subsp. sibirica, also known as Siberian thrift, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Plumbaginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Armeria scabra subsp. sibirica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
